# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: fork

before_script:
  - echo "title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" >> .gitlab-ci.yml
  - echo "description: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" >> .gitlab-ci.yml

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project with MR title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - merge_requests

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  before_script:
    - echo "tag: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" >> .gitlab-ci.yml
  script:
    - echo "Deploying project with title: $CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
  only:
    - merge_requests
